alternatives.Tessellation: Use LOD Groups instead of tessellation for VR performance
alternatives.Geometry Shaders: Use compute shaders or vertex shaders for particle effects
alternatives.Surface Shaders (complex): Use URP Lit/Simple Lit with Single Pass Instanced support
alternatives.Heavy Post-Processing (SSAO, SSR, Motion: Disable Motion Blur (causes nausea), use baked AO, limit post-processing to Bloom and Color Grading

renderingConstraints.foveatedRendering: Enable Fixed Foveated Rendering on supported HMDs

comfortGuidelines.locomotion: Use teleportation or tunneling vignette to reduce motion sickness
comfortGuidelines.frameDrops: Any frame drop below target causes discomfort — maintain consistent frame rate
comfortGuidelines.uiPlacement: Place UI at 1-3 meters distance, avoid UI attached to head movement
comfortGuidelines.audioSpatialization: Use spatial audio for immersion and comfort
